entities.name: Recent Individual Contributor Experience
entities.context: Hiring criterion emphasizing candidates with hands-on, recent building experience rather than just management titles

entities.name: Senior Management Pedigree
entities.context: Traditional hiring signal V considers insufficient alone for technical roles

entities.name: Ability to Build
entities.context: Core technical capability to actually create/implement; one axis of evaluation framework

entities.name: Ability to Direct Others
entities.context: Leadership capability to guide team members; second axis of evaluation framework

entities.name: Build + Direct Venn Diagram
entities.context: Framework for evaluating technical candidates on intersection of hands-on building and leadership ability

entities.name: Technical Advisor
entities.context: Resource to guide technical hiring decisions when lacking internal expertise

relationships.context: IC experience prioritized over management pedigree for technical hires
Two dimensions that intersect in the Venn diagram evaluation framework
Build capability is one axis of the framework
Directing capability is the other axis of the framework
Advisor can help apply the framework to guide hiring decisions
